\tzpentry{ID4563}{Vacuum Quantum Zeta-Regularized Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4563 introduces Vacuum Quantum Zeta-Regularized Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} E_{\text{vacuum}} = -\frac{\hbar}{2} \zeta(-1/2) \implies \text{Finite } E_{\text{extracted}} \end{equation}
